chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P No. S- 162 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of main case. 27.06.2025. Mr. Ahmed Ali Shahani, Assistant Advocate General Sindh and Ms. Shabbana Naheed Assistant Prosecutor General. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- On 07.04.2025, Investigating Officer of Crime No. 144/2023 submitted his statement through the learned Additional Advocate General Sindh. However none appeared on behalf of the petitioners. On the subsequent date i.e 20.06.2025, once again there was no representation for the petitioners. In the interest of justice, office was directed to reissue notice to the petitioner No.1, and further directed that notice to petitioner No.2 to be served through General Secretary of the High Court Bar Association Sukkur. Despite these directions, the petitioners failed to appear or take any steps in furtherance of their case. Today, again, there is no appearance on behalf of petitioners, nor has any intimation been received. This conduct clearly reflects that the petitioners are no longer interested in prosecuting the matter. Accordingly, instant petition stands dismissed for non-prosecution. J U D G E Irfan/PS
